mitm_gate.note: 5 distinct shape digests / 5 controls on both probe paths; no collapse; observation position not rewriting L7

auth_posture_evidence: /api/sessions/ -> 422 'Field required: query.user_id' (missing PARAM, not missing TOKEN). AutoGen 0.4.x has no API auth; data scoped by user_id query param. No 401/403 auth wall at app layer. The ICP 403 is an Aliyun compliance proxy (rate/connection-triggered), not app auth.

honeypot_discrimination.relabel_title: Software R&D Intelligent Factory (Shodan http.title) + 'Non-compliance ICP Filing' interstitial = Aliyun ICP-compliance wrapper, NOT honeypot
honeypot_discrimination.canned_vs_real: bodies DIFFER per route (version JSON / health JSON / 422 param-error / 404 detail / 307 redirect / swagger HTML) -> genuine FastAPI router, not canned-identical
honeypot_discrimination.inference_timing: version returned authentic body then 403-ICP on immediate repeat = real app behind rate-throttled compliance proxy, consistent with live service
honeypot_discrimination.console_fingerprint: cert CN ai.tmianyang.com / O=TMianyang / Sichuan CN = coherent legitimate operator attribution
honeypot_discrimination.verdict: NOT a honeypot. Genuine AutoGen Studio behind Aliyun ICP proxy + Shodan relabel.

llm_config_note: Model/LLM config surface (/api/gallery model_client component defs) EXISTS in router (307/422 routing evidence) but a clean 200 config-shape read was NOT positively exercised (ICP throttle + restraint). Refute-by-default: presence boolean recorded False since not positively read. NO provider key value read/printed/stored.

restraint_compliance.no_data_exfil: did NOT supply a user_id to enumerate tenant sessions/teams; auth-off established at contract layer (422-missing-param)
restraint_compliance.no_compute: /api/runs and all /run /execute /invoke /test /stream /ws hard-refused at code level; never issued

insight68_rung: Depth A (logic-layer: 422-missing-param vs 401-missing-token contract distinction) x Breadth 1 (in-scope host confirmed live & auth-off; population NOT enumerated by choice/restraint) = A1
